titleStmt.title: SII 33.37: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 37. (A.R. No. 143 of 1946.) Pulivendla, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Nāni-Kāluva about a mile away from the village.
This is dated Śaka 1296, Ānanda, Kārttika śu. 1, Vaḍḍavāra, corresponding to 1374 A.D. October 7, Saturday, °25.

Records the gift of land in the village Pulivendla on daśavandha tenure to Perumāḍireḍḍi by the chief Bhairavadēvarāja (who had titles Pāṇḍyarāyagajakēsari and Kalukaḍapurvarādhīśvara) of Pulivendla. It is also stated that the land was situated near the canal, to the west of the village, dug by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga siraḥścuṁbi caṁ
dracāmaracāravētrailōkya
nagarāraṁbhaṁ mūla
staṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . 8 svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śaka varuṣa
ṁbulu 12(9)6 Agunēṁḍi Ānaṁda saṁ
vvatsara kārttika śu 1 va svasti śrī maṁnma
hāmaḍḍalēsvara rāyajagada
ḷa bhujabhaḷa bhīmavīra tauḍinārā
yaṇa pāṁḍyarāya gajakēsari Avu
duṁbarābharaṇa kalukaḍa puravarā
dhīsvara Aṣṭamāsiddhisiddhanādha dē
va divyaśrī pādapadmārā
dhakulaina puliviṁdala bhairavadēvamahārāju
lu puliviṁdala paḍumaṭi tārutra
vviṁppina mēḷa kālvanu tamaku savva
māṁnyamugānu tamaku jelle ni
gha Ā kālvalona sagamu Āsa
gamulona tama pūrvvamaina prā
ṁtakāpu muppe perumāḍi
reḍiki dasavaṁdaṁ panima
khānaku srōtriyya savvamāṁ
nyamugānu maṇuvu pāḍi
E(pa)ṁdumu vaṭṭivittanaṁ Ā
liki Āttamaḍi Ācadrākamugā
nu māṁnyamu Isti
mi maṁgaḷamahā
śrī śrī śrī bhairayadēvama
Digital edition of SII 33.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
